---
title: "Pokemon Battle"
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Press+Start+2P&display=swap');
#pb { font-family: 'Press Start 2P', monospace; font-size: 10px; padding: 0.5rem 0; }

/* Team bars */
.team-bar { display: flex; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 10px; align-items: center; }
.tb-label-sm { font-size: 7px; color: #888; margin-right: 2px; min-width: 36px; }
.team-icon { width: 36px; height: 36px; image-rendering: pixelated; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid #ddd; background: #fafafa; transition: border-color 0.2s, opacity 0.3s; }
.team-icon.active { border-color: #4CAF50; }
.team-icon.fainted { opacity: 0.25; filter: grayscale(1); border-color: #ddd; }

/* Arena */
.arena { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.arena-card { border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px; text-align: center; background: #fafafa; }
.ac-label { font-size: 7px; color: #888; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.ac-name { font-size: 10px; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: capitalize; }
.ac-info { font-size: 7px; color: #888; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.ac-sprite { width: 80px; height: 80px; image-rendering: pixelated; transition: opacity 0.4s; }
.ac-sprite.fainted { opacity: 0.15; filter: grayscale(1); }
.type-badge { display: inline-block; border-radius: 3px; padding: 1px 5px; font-size: 7px; color: #fff; margin: 2px 2px 4px; }
.hp-wrap { background: #ddd; border-radius: 4px; height: 7px; margin: 5px 0; overflow: hidden; }
.hp-bar { height: 100%; border-radius: 4px; transition: width 0.4s, background 0.3s; }
.hp-text { font-size: 7px; color: #888; }
.item-badge { font-size: 7px; color: #888; margin-top: 3px; }

/* Log */
#pb-log { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 9px; min-height: 38px; margin-bottom: 12px; line-height: 1.9; }

/* Moves */
.moves-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.move-btn { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px; font-size: 8px; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; font-family: 'Press Start 2P', monospace; transition: background 0.1s; }
.move-btn:hover:not(:disabled) { background: #f0f0f0; }
.move-btn:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }
.mb-name { font-size: 9px; margin-bottom: 3px; text-transform: capitalize; }
.mb-meta { font-size: 7px; color: #888; }

/* Actions */
.actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; }
.act-btn { flex: 1; padding: 8px; font-size: 8px; font-family: 'Press Start 2P', monospace; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; background: #fff; }
.act-btn:hover { background: #f0f0f0; }

/* Animations */
.shake { animation: shake 0.3s; }
@keyframes shake { 0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)} 25%{transform:translateX(-8px)} 75%{transform:translateX(8px)} }
.flash { animation: flash 0.3s; }
@keyframes flash { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0.2} }

#no-team { text-align:center; padding:2rem; font-size:9px; color:#888; line-height:2; }
#no-team a { color:#333; }
#pb-loading { text-align:center; padding:2rem; font-size:9px; color:#888; }
</style>

<div id="pb">
  <div id="no-team" style="display:none">
    No team found!<br><br>
    <a href="team-builder.html">Build your team first →</a>
  </div>
  <div id="pb-loading">Loading...</div>
  <div id="pb-game" style="display:none">
    <div class="team-bar">
      <span class="tb-label-sm">You</span>
      <div id="your-icons"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="team-bar">
      <span class="tb-label-sm">Foe</span>
      <div id="foe-icons"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="arena">
      <div class="arena-card">
        <div class="ac-label">Your Pokemon</div>
        <div class="ac-name" id="p-name">—</div>
        <div class="ac-info" id="p-info"></div>
        <img class="ac-sprite" id="p-sprite" src="" alt="Your Pokemon">
        <div id="p-types"></div>
        <div class="hp-wrap"><div class="hp-bar" id="p-hpbar" style="width:100%;background:#4CAF50"></div></div>
        <div class="hp-text" id="p-hptext"></div>
        <div class="item-badge" id="p-item"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="arena-card">
        <div class="ac-label">Wild Pokemon</div>
        <div class="ac-name" id="e-name">—</div>
        <div class="ac-info" id="e-info"></div>
        <img class="ac-sprite" id="e-sprite" src="" alt="Enemy Pokemon">
        <div id="e-types"></div>
        <div class="hp-wrap"><div class="hp-bar" id="e-hpbar" style="width:100%;background:#4CAF50"></div></div>
        <div class="hp-text" id="e-hptext"></div>
        <div class="item-badge" id="e-item"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div id="pb-log">Battle starting...</div>
    <div class="moves-grid" id="moves-grid"></div>
    <div class="actions">
      <button class="act-btn" id="btn-potion" onclick="usePotion()">Potion (3)</button>
      <button class="act-btn" onclick="newBattle()">New battle</button>
      <button class="act-btn" onclick="window.location.href='team-builder.html'">Edit team</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const TC = {fire:{grass:2,ice:2,bug:2,steel:2,water:0.5,fire:0.5,rock:0.5,dragon:0.5},water:{fire:2,ground:2,rock:2,water:0.5,grass:0.5,dragon:0.5},electric:{water:2,flying:2,electric:0.5,grass:0.5,dragon:0.5,ground:0},grass:{water:2,ground:2,rock:2,fire:0.5,grass:0.5,poison:0.5,flying:0.5,bug:0.5,dragon:0.5,steel:0.5},ice:{grass:2,ground:2,flying:2,dragon:2,fire:0.5,water:0.5,ice:0.5,steel:0.5},fighting:{normal:2,ice:2,rock:2,dark:2,steel:2,poison:0.5,flying:0.5,psychic:0.5,bug:0.5,ghost:0,fairy:0.5},poison:{grass:2,fairy:2,poison:0.5,ground:0.5,rock:0.5,ghost:0.5,steel:0},ground:{fire:2,electric:2,poison:2,rock:2,steel:2,grass:0.5,bug:0.5,flying:0},flying:{grass:2,fighting:2,bug:2,electric:0.5,rock:0.5,steel:0.5},psychic:{fighting:2,poison:2,psychic:0.5,dark:0,steel:0.5},bug:{grass:2,psychic:2,dark:2,fire:0.5,fighting:0.5,poison:0.5,flying:0.5,ghost:0.5,steel:0.5,fairy:0.5},rock:{fire:2,ice:2,flying:2,bug:2,fighting:0.5,ground:0.5,steel:0.5},ghost:{psychic:2,ghost:2,normal:0,dark:0.5},dragon:{dragon:2,steel:0.5,fairy:0},dark:{psychic:2,ghost:2,fighting:0.5,dark:0.5,fairy:0.5},steel:{ice:2,rock:2,fairy:2,fire:0.5,water:0.5,electric:0.5,steel:0.5},fairy:{fighting:2,dragon:2,dark:2,fire:0.5,poison:0.5,steel:0.5},normal:{rock:0.5,steel:0.5,ghost:0}};
const TYPE_COLORS = {fire:'#F08030',water:'#6890F0',grass:'#78C850',electric:'#F8D030',psychic:'#F85888',ice:'#98D8D8',dragon:'#7038F8',dark:'#705848',fairy:'#EE99AC',normal:'#A8A878',fighting:'#C03028',poison:'#A040A0',ground:'#E0C068',flying:'#A890F0',bug:'#A8B820',rock:'#B8A038',ghost:'#705898',steel:'#B8B8D0'};

function calcHP(base) { return Math.floor((2*base+31)*50/100)+50+10; }
function calcStat(base) { return Math.floor((Math.floor((2*base+31)*50/100)+5)); }
function cap(s) { return s?s.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+s.slice(1).replace(/-/g,' '):''; }
function wait(ms) { return new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms)); }
function getEff(mtype, defTypes) { let m=1; defTypes.forEach(t=>{m*=(TC[mtype]?.[t]??1);}); return m; }

let yourTeam = [], foeTeam = [], yourIdx = 0, foeIdx = 0, potions = 3, busy = false, lockedMove = null, foeLocked = null;

function deepClone(obj) { return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj)); }

async function newBattle() {
  document.getElementById('pb-game').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('pb-loading').style.display='block';
  document.getElementById('no-team').style.display='none';
  busy=true;
  let saved=[];
  try { saved=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('pokeTeam')||'[]'); } catch(e){}
  if (!saved.length) { document.getElementById('pb-loading').style.display='none'; document.getElementById('no-team').style.display='block'; return; }
  yourTeam = deepClone(saved).map(p=>({...p,currentHP:p.maxHP,fainted:false,sashUsed:false,berryUsed:false,stages:{attack:0,defense:0,spAtk:0,spDef:0,speed:0},protecting:false}));
  foeTeam = await buildFoeTeam();
  yourIdx=0; foeIdx=0; potions=3; lockedMove=null; foeLocked=null;
  document.getElementById('btn-potion').textContent='Potion (3)';
  document.getElementById('pb-loading').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('pb-game').style.display='block';
  renderTeamIcons();
  renderActive();
  renderMoves();
  log('A wild team appeared! Go ' + cap(yourTeam[0].name) + '!');
  busy=false;
}

async function buildFoeTeam() {
  const ids = [];
  while (ids.length < 6) { const n=Math.floor(Math.random()*151)+1; if(!ids.includes(n)) ids.push(n); }
  const team = await Promise.all(ids.map(id => fetchFoePokemon(id)));
  return team;
}

async function fetchFoePokemon(id) {
  const r = await fetch('https://pokeapi.co/api/v2/pokemon/'+id);
  const d = await r.json();
  const stats = {}; d.stats.forEach(s=>{stats[s.stat.name]=s.base_stat;});
  const moveCandidates = d.moves.filter(m=>m.version_group_details.some(v=>v.move_learn_method.name==='level-up'&&v.level_learned_at<=50)).slice(0,8);
  const moveData = await Promise.all(moveCandidates.slice(0,4).map(async m=>{
    try {
      const mr=await fetch(m.move.url); const md=await mr.json();
      const effEntry=md.effect_entries?md.effect_entries.find(e=>e.language.name==='en'):null;
      return {name:md.name,type:md.type.name,power:md.power??null,accuracy:md.accuracy??100,pp:md.pp||10,maxPP:md.pp||10,damageClass:md.damage_class.name,desc:effEntry?effEntry.short_effect:'—',statChanges:(md.stat_changes||[]).map(sc=>({stat:sc.stat.name,change:sc.change})),metaCategory:md.meta?.category?.name||'',moveTarget:md.target?.name||'selected-pokemon',heal:md.meta?.healing||0};
    } catch(e) { return {name:'tackle',type:'normal',power:40,accuracy:100,pp:35,maxPP:35,damageClass:'physical',desc:'Tackle'}; }
  }));
  const moves = moveData.length ? moveData : [{name:'tackle',type:'normal',power:40,accuracy:100,pp:35,maxPP:35,damageClass:'physical',desc:'Tackle'}];
  return {
    id, name:d.name, sprite:d.sprites.front_default, backSprite:d.sprites.back_default||d.sprites.front_default,
    types:d.types.map(t=>t.type.name), moves, item:{name:'None',effect:'none'},
    maxHP:calcHP(stats.hp||45), currentHP:calcHP(stats.hp||45),
    attack:calcStat(stats.attack||45), defense:calcStat(stats.defense||45),
    spAtk:calcStat(stats['special-attack']||45), spDef:calcStat(stats['special-defense']||45),
    speed:calcStat(stats.speed||45), fainted:false, sashUsed:false, berryUsed:false,
    stages:{attack:0,defense:0,spAtk:0,spDef:0,speed:0}, protecting:false,
  };
}

function yourPoke() { return yourTeam[yourIdx]; }
function foePoke() { return foeTeam[foeIdx]; }

function renderTeamIcons() {
  const yi=document.getElementById('your-icons'); yi.innerHTML='';
  yourTeam.forEach((p,i)=>{
    const img=document.createElement('img'); img.className='team-icon'+(i===yourIdx?' active':'')+(p.fainted?' fainted':'');
    img.src=p.sprite; img.title=cap(p.name); img.style.width='32px'; img.style.height='32px'; img.style.imageRendering='pixelated';
    yi.appendChild(img);
  });
  const fi=document.getElementById('foe-icons'); fi.innerHTML='';
  foeTeam.forEach((p,i)=>{
    const img=document.createElement('img'); img.className='team-icon'+(i===foeIdx?' active':'')+(p.fainted?' fainted':'');
    img.src=p.sprite; img.title=cap(p.name); img.style.width='32px'; img.style.height='32px'; img.style.imageRendering='pixelated';
    fi.appendChild(img);
  });
}

function renderActive() {
  const yp=yourPoke(), fp=foePoke();
  document.getElementById('p-sprite').src=yp.backSprite||yp.sprite;
  document.getElementById('p-name').textContent=cap(yp.name);
  document.getElementById('p-info').textContent=cap(yp.ability?.name||'');
  document.getElementById('p-item').textContent=yp.item.name!=='None'?'@ '+yp.item.name:'';
  document.getElementById('p-types').innerHTML=yp.types.map(t=>`<span class="type-badge" style="background:${TYPE_COLORS[t]||'#888'}">${t}</span>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('e-sprite').src=fp.sprite;
  document.getElementById('e-name').textContent=cap(fp.name);
  document.getElementById('e-info').textContent=cap(fp.ability?.name||'');
  document.getElementById('e-item').textContent=fp.item.name!=='None'?'@ '+fp.item.name:'';
  document.getElementById('e-types').innerHTML=fp.types.map(t=>`<span class="type-badge" style="background:${TYPE_COLORS[t]||'#888'}">${t}</span>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('p-sprite').classList.toggle('fainted',yp.fainted);
  document.getElementById('e-sprite').classList.toggle('fainted',fp.fainted);
  updateHP('p',yp); updateHP('e',fp);
}

function updateHP(who, poke) {
  const pct=Math.max(0,poke.currentHP/poke.maxHP*100);
  const bar=document.getElementById(who+'-hpbar');
  bar.style.width=pct+'%';
  bar.style.background=pct>50?'#4CAF50':pct>20?'#FFC107':'#f44336';
  document.getElementById(who+'-hptext').textContent=Math.max(0,poke.currentHP)+' / '+poke.maxHP+' HP';
}

function renderMoves() {
  const grid=document.getElementById('moves-grid'); grid.innerHTML='';
  const yp=yourPoke();
  if (!yp || yp.fainted) return;
  yp.moves.forEach((m,i)=>{
    const b=document.createElement('button');
    b.className='move-btn'; b.onclick=()=>takeTurn(i);
    b.disabled=(lockedMove!==null&&lockedMove!==i)||m.pp<=0;
    b.innerHTML=`<div class="mb-name">${cap(m.name)}</div><div class="mb-meta" style="color:${TYPE_COLORS[m.type]||'#888'}">${m.type} · ${m.power?m.power+' pwr':'status'} · ${m.accuracy?m.accuracy+'%':'—'} · PP ${m.pp}/${m.maxPP}</div>`;
    grid.appendChild(b);
  });
}

function setAllDisabled(v) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.move-btn').forEach(b=>b.disabled=v);
  document.getElementById('btn-potion').disabled=v;
}

function stageMultiplier(stage) { const s=Math.max(-6,Math.min(6,stage||0)); return s>=0?(2+s)/2:2/(2-s); }

function calcDamage(move, atk, def) {
  if (!move.power) return 0;
  const A = move.damageClass==='physical' ? atk.attack*stageMultiplier(atk.stages?.attack) : atk.spAtk*stageMultiplier(atk.stages?.spAtk);
  const D = move.damageClass==='physical' ? def.defense*stageMultiplier(def.stages?.defense) : def.spDef*stageMultiplier(def.stages?.spDef);
  const stab = atk.types.includes(move.type) ? 1.5 : 1;
  const eff = getEff(move.type, def.types);
  let atkMult = 1;
  if (atk.item) {
    if (atk.item.effect==='choiceband'&&move.damageClass==='physical') atkMult=1.5;
    if (atk.item.effect==='choicespecs'&&move.damageClass==='special') atkMult=1.5;
    if (atk.item.effect==='lifeorb') atkMult=1.3;
    if (atk.item.effect==='assaultvest'&&move.damageClass==='special') atkMult=0.5;
  }
  const rng=0.85+Math.random()*0.15;
  const base=Math.floor(Math.floor(Math.floor(2*50/5+2)*move.power*(A*atkMult)/Math.max(1,D)/50)+2);
  return Math.max(1,Math.floor(base*stab*eff*rng));
}

function effText(eff) { if(eff>=4) return "It's super duper effective!"; if(eff>=2) return "It's super effective!"; if(eff===0) return "It had no effect..."; if(eff<1) return "It's not very effective..."; return ""; }

async function takeTurn(moveIdx) {
  if (busy) return;
  busy=true; setAllDisabled(true);
  const yp=yourPoke(), fp=foePoke();
  const ym=yp.moves[moveIdx];
  if (!ym || ym.pp<=0) { busy=false; setAllDisabled(false); return; }

  // Clear protect from previous turn
  yp.protecting=false; fp.protecting=false;

  // Handle choice items
  if (yp.item?.effect?.startsWith('choice') && lockedMove===null) lockedMove=moveIdx;

  // Speed check
  let yourSpd=yp.speed*stageMultiplier(yp.stages?.speed)*(yp.item?.effect==='choicescarf'?1.5:1);
  let foeSpd=fp.speed*stageMultiplier(fp.stages?.speed)*(fp.item?.effect==='choicescarf'?1.5:1);
  const yourFirst=yourSpd>=foeSpd;

  if (yourFirst) {
    const done=await doMove(ym, yp, fp, 'p', 'e'); if(done) return;
    await wait(300);
    const done2=await enemyMove(); if(done2) return;
  } else {
    const done=await enemyMove(); if(done) return;
    await wait(300);
    const done2=await doMove(ym, yp, fp, 'p', 'e'); if(done2) return;
  }

  await endOfTurn();
  renderMoves();
  busy=false; setAllDisabled(false);
}

async function doStatusMove(move, atk, def, atkWho, defWho) {
  // Protect / Detect
  if (['protect','detect','endure','wide-guard','quick-guard'].includes(move.name)||move.metaCategory==='protect') {
    atk.protecting=true;
    log(cap(atk.name)+' is protecting itself!'); await wait(700); return false;
  }
  // Healing moves
  if (move.metaCategory==='heal'||(move.heal&&move.heal>0)) {
    const heal=Math.floor(atk.maxHP*(move.heal||50)/100);
    atk.currentHP=Math.min(atk.maxHP,atk.currentHP+heal);
    updateHP(atkWho,atk);
    log(cap(atk.name)+' restored HP with '+cap(move.name)+'!'); await wait(700); return false;
  }
  // Stat changes
  if (move.statChanges&&move.statChanges.length>0) {
    if (!atk.stages) atk.stages={attack:0,defense:0,spAtk:0,spDef:0,speed:0};
    if (!def.stages) def.stages={attack:0,defense:0,spAtk:0,spDef:0,speed:0};
    let msgs=[cap(atk.name)+' used '+cap(move.name)+'!'];
    for (const sc of move.statChanges) {
      const selfTarget=move.moveTarget==='user';
      const tgt=selfTarget?atk:def; const tgtWho=selfTarget?atkWho:defWho;
      const key=sc.stat==='special-attack'?'spAtk':sc.stat==='special-defense'?'spDef':sc.stat;
      const oldS=tgt.stages[key]||0;
      tgt.stages[key]=Math.max(-6,Math.min(6,oldS+sc.change));
      if (tgt.stages[key]!==oldS) {
        const dir=sc.change>0?'rose':'fell'; const mag=Math.abs(sc.change)>=2?' sharply':'';
        msgs.push(cap(tgt.name)+"'s "+sc.stat.replace(/-/g,' ')+mag+' '+dir+'!');
      } else {
        msgs.push(cap(tgt.name)+"'s stats won't go any "+(sc.change>0?'higher':'lower')+'!');
      }
    }
    log(msgs.join(' ')); await wait(800); return false;
  }
  log(cap(atk.name)+' used '+cap(move.name)+'! But nothing happened...'); await wait(700); return false;
}

async function doMove(move, atk, def, atkWho, defWho) {
  move.pp=Math.max(0,move.pp-1);

  // Protect check — block if defender is protected (and this isn't a status move targeting self)
  if (def.protecting && move.damageClass!=='status') {
    log(cap(atk.name)+' used '+cap(move.name)+'! But '+cap(def.name)+' is protecting itself!');
    await wait(700); return false;
  }

  if (!move.power) { return await doStatusMove(move,atk,def,atkWho,defWho); }
  const hit=Math.random()*100<=(move.accuracy??100);
  if (!hit) { log(cap(atk.name)+' used '+cap(move.name)+'... but it missed!'); await wait(700); return false; }
  const dmg=calcDamage(move,atk,def);
  const eff=getEff(move.type,def.types);

  // Focus Sash
  if (def.item?.effect==='focussash'&&!def.sashUsed&&def.currentHP===def.maxHP&&dmg>=def.currentHP) {
    def.currentHP=1; def.sashUsed=true;
    log(cap(atk.name)+' used '+cap(move.name)+'! '+cap(def.name)+' held on with Focus Sash!');
  } else {
    def.currentHP=Math.max(0,def.currentHP-dmg);
    const effMsg=effText(eff);
    log(cap(atk.name)+' used '+cap(move.name)+'! '+cap(def.name)+' took '+dmg+' damage! '+effMsg);
  }
  shake(defWho+'-sprite'); updateHP(defWho,def); renderTeamIcons();
  await wait(900);

  // Shell Bell
  if (atk.item?.effect==='shellbell') {
    const heal=Math.floor(dmg/8);
    atk.currentHP=Math.min(atk.maxHP,atk.currentHP+heal);
    updateHP(atkWho,atk);
  }
  // Rocky Helmet (contact only)
  if (def.item?.effect==='rockyhelmet'&&move.damageClass==='physical') {
    const rocky=Math.floor(atk.maxHP/6);
    atk.currentHP=Math.max(0,atk.currentHP-rocky);
    log(cap(def.name)+"'s Rocky Helmet hurt "+cap(atk.name)+"!");
    updateHP(atkWho,atk); await wait(600);
  }
  // Life Orb recoil
  if (atk.item?.effect==='lifeorb') {
    const recoil=Math.floor(atk.maxHP/10);
    atk.currentHP=Math.max(0,atk.currentHP-recoil);
    updateHP(atkWho,atk);
  }

  if (def.currentHP<=0) {
    def.fainted=true;
    flash(defWho+'-sprite');
    log(cap(def.name)+' fainted!'); await wait(800);
    renderTeamIcons();
    return await handleFaint(defWho);
  }
  return false;
}

async function enemyMove() {
  const fp=foePoke(), yp=yourPoke();
  const avail=fp.moves.filter(m=>m.pp>0);
  if (!avail.length) { log('Wild '+cap(fp.name)+' has no moves left!'); return false; }
  let move;
  if (fp.item?.effect?.startsWith('choice')&&foeLocked!==null) {
    move=fp.moves[foeLocked]&&fp.moves[foeLocked].pp>0?fp.moves[foeLocked]:avail[0];
  } else {
    move=avail[Math.floor(Math.random()*avail.length)];
    if (fp.item?.effect?.startsWith('choice')&&foeLocked===null) foeLocked=fp.moves.indexOf(move);
  }
  return await doMove(move,fp,yp,'e','p');
}

async function endOfTurn() {
  const pairs=[{p:yourPoke(),who:'p'},{p:foePoke(),who:'e'}];
  for (const {p,who} of pairs) {
    if (p.fainted) continue;
    if (p.item?.effect==='leftovers'||p.item?.effect==='blacksludge'&&p.types?.includes('poison')) {
      const heal=Math.floor(p.maxHP/16); p.currentHP=Math.min(p.maxHP,p.currentHP+heal);
      updateHP(who,p);
    }
    if (p.item?.effect==='sitrusberry'&&!p.berryUsed&&p.currentHP/p.maxHP<0.5) {
      const heal=Math.floor(p.maxHP*0.25); p.currentHP=Math.min(p.maxHP,p.currentHP+heal);
      p.berryUsed=true; log(cap(p.name)+"'s Sitrus Berry restored some HP!"); updateHP(who,p); await wait(600);
    }
  }
}

async function handleFaint(who) {
  if (who==='e') {
    const next=foeTeam.findIndex((p,i)=>i>foeIdx&&!p.fainted);
    if (next===-1) { log('You defeated the wild team! You win!'); renderTeamIcons(); return true; }
    foeIdx=next; foeLocked=null;
    log('Wild '+cap(foePoke().name)+' was sent out!'); await wait(600);
    renderActive(); renderTeamIcons(); return false;
  } else {
    const next=yourTeam.findIndex((p,i)=>i>yourIdx&&!p.fainted);
    if (next===-1) { log('All your Pokemon fainted! You lose!'); renderTeamIcons(); return true; }
    yourIdx=next; lockedMove=null;
    log('Go '+cap(yourPoke().name)+'!'); await wait(600);
    renderActive(); renderMoves(); renderTeamIcons(); return false;
  }
}

async function usePotion() {
  if (busy||potions<=0) return;
  const yp=yourPoke(); if(yp.fainted) return;
  busy=true; setAllDisabled(true);
  potions--;
  const heal=Math.floor(yp.maxHP*0.4);
  yp.currentHP=Math.min(yp.maxHP,yp.currentHP+heal);
  updateHP('p',yp);
  document.getElementById('btn-potion').textContent='Potion ('+potions+')';
  log(cap(yp.name)+' recovered '+heal+' HP!'); await wait(700);
  await enemyMove();
  await endOfTurn();
  renderMoves();
  busy=false; setAllDisabled(false);
}

function shake(id){const el=document.getElementById(id);if(!el)return;el.classList.add('shake');setTimeout(()=>el.classList.remove('shake'),300);}
function flash(id){const el=document.getElementById(id);if(!el)return;el.classList.add('flash');setTimeout(()=>el.classList.remove('flash'),300);}
function log(msg){document.getElementById('pb-log').textContent=msg;}

newBattle();
</script>
```
